TYPE: NUM 

LENGTH: 12 

SOURCE: CMS (HPMS files) 

VALUES: — 

COMMENT: This variable will only be populated if the plan has an enhanced benefit design with extra coverage in 
the gap. The coverage gap is technically referred to as the initial coverage limit (ICL) for the Part D 
benefit. 

Starting in 2016, CMS changed how they describe pharmacy networks. The mail order pharmacies are
